title: Recursion
story: 继续熟悉优先队列的行为。
discovery_hint: PrioQueue + PopEach 会得到从小到大的序列。

post_story.speaker: S.
post_story.text: I put this sequence in because it made me laugh.

post_story.speaker: S.
post_story.text: Livia never got it. She said "what is that, your hard drive serial number?"

post_story.speaker: S.
post_story.text: I still loved her. I love her even now. In whatever tense applies.
